Task 2 is about implementing a parser. The task says that the base code has already implemented most of the functionality including:
- Abstract Semantic Graph (ASG) definition
- Most semantic node parsing (both Bison and ANTLR)
- Complete code for ASG to JSON output
- Other auxiliary implementation

The expected workload is 1000-2000 lines of code.

Let me check the ANTLR parser file to see what needs to be implemented.
